mainContent.title: Background
mainContent.textContent: Not much is known about mysterious, mythical figure known as the Poro King. The only evidence of his existence on Runeterra is a homemade plush owned by a young Freljordian girl named Ingvar the Younger, who is the niece of Bjerg the Wanderer, dismissed by many as a senile old man for his 3 tall tales and ramblings. Ingvar, taking after her uncle, insists that the Poro King is real—he is the protector of all the peoples of Runeterra, and is the ruler of "a gajillion trillion poros." Ingvar has appointed herself the Freljord's "Poro Supervisor" in search of adventure, but her mother believes the Poro King is just a figment of her overactive imagination.

mainContent.title: Appearance
mainContent.textContent: The Poro King is a round white poro with a large white mustache and goatee, bushy eyebrows, a large red tongue, and curly dark brown horns protruding from the top of his head. While larger than the average poro, he retains the same small and fluffy appearance his species is known for. He is often depicted wearing a golden crown with a red gemstone in the center, as well as a red cape, a golden scepter, and fine red-and-gold shoes on his feet.

mainContent.title: Personality
mainContent.textContent: Like all poros, the Poro King enjoys Poro-Snax. While little is known about poro politics, he is noted to be heroic in nature.

children.title: Ingvar the Younger
children.textContent: Ingvar is a little girl in the Freljord who owns a beloved homemade plush of the Poro King. She imagines him to be a heroic protector of all the peoples of Runeterra, but her mother does not believe the Poro King is real.
